data.body: On main, onResult/onTurnEnded is only wired in src/lib/terminal-manager-initial-io.ts:62. The take-loop runtime in src/lib/terminal-manager-take-child.ts:194-209 creates createSessionRuntime WITHOUT any onResult/onTurnEnded handler. This means take iterations 2, 3, 4… have zero in-session followup capability — the code relies entirely on post-close agent rotation via buildNextTakePrompt. User asserted this was 'definitely 100% fixed' but the bug is still on main. Wire an onTurnEnded handler in spawnTakeChild/createTakeRuntimeBundle so every take iteration gets the same followup-on-turn-end semantics as the initial child. The followup content should be context-appropriate: if the beat is still in an active state after turn-ended but the agent is still alive, send a prompt asking it to complete its work or roll back. This knot DEPENDS on knot a401 (onTurnEnded rename) — must land after that one.
data.title: Wire onTurnEnded in take-loop runtime
